evidence_text:
2 PURPOSE

This Asset Management Policy ("Policy") aims to ensure appropriate classification and protection of <CLIENT>'s information and assets.

Further, the Policy establishes a commitment to comply with applicable sections of the federal and global laws and regulations, including but not limited to UAE Information Assurance Regulation, Federal Decree Law No. 45 of 2021 regarding the Protection of Personal Data, ISO 27001, ISO 27701, ISO 20000, ISO 22301 and UAE National Cyber Risk Mana
